title: rubus × hermannii
intro: Rubus × hermannii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus × hermannii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
